titleStmt.title: SII 9.96: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 96. (A.R. No. 230 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT TUMBIGERE, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: The record is damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of a Chāḷukya king (name lost) and mentions his feudatory Jagadēkamallanirmaḍi-Noḷamba • • • Permānaḍidēva as ruling over Kōgaḷi five-hundred, Kariviḍi thirty and other divisions and the five villages from his capital Gaṇgati. It records that Pergaḍe Chandimayya- Nāyaka made, with the consent of the king, a gift of 400 kammas of land for the god Mūlasthānadēva at Tumbigeṟe, 300 kammas to the ascetics of the place and 6 mattars to the maṭha. Jagadēkamallanirmaḍi-Noḷamba[pallava]-Permmānaḍidēva figuring here was a subordinate of Jayasiṁha II, and hence this record may have to be relegated to his reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhamahārājādhirāja A
kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
yarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapa
vānvaya śrīprithvīvallabha pallavakuḷatiḷakanamōghavākya
śvaraṁ śrīmajjagadēkamallanirmmaḍinoḷaṁba permmānaḍidēva
sāyiramaṁ kōgaḷiyaynūṟu
ppattuṁ kariviḍi mūvattuṁ paṁcagrāme nigrahavi
dināḷuttaṁ gaṁgatiya nelevīḍinalu kathāvinōda
ttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrī kaḍita
verggaḍe candimayyanāyakaru binnapaṁgeydu tanna prabhusāmyadūru bikkiga
nerppattaṟa baḷiya tuṁbigeṟeya mūlasthānadēvarggalliya piriyakeṟe
ya keḷage dēvara nivēdyakke biḍisidda gardde kaṁ 400 Alliya maṭhada naiṣṭikatapō
dhanargge biṭṭa gardde kamma 200 Aṁtu gardde ka(ṁ)mma 700 Ūrindaṁ paḍuvalajjiya bāgindaṁ
mūḍaldēvargge biṭṭa beddalu moge matta 6 maṭhakke moge beddale matta 6 Antu ma
tta 12 Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidarggargghyatīrtthaṁprayāgebāṇarāsiya
lsāsira kavileyaṁ caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda phala
makkumidanaḷidaṁgā tīrtthadalā brāhmaṇarumanā kavileyumanaḷi
da pātakamakku © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi
rvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasē
tūnṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sarvvannētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēndrō bhū
yō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
